subparts.text: What do you mean by Dimensionality reduction? Why is it required?
What is BERT? Explain its working.
Explain the applications of Computer Vision.
How is GAN utilized in Audio generation? Explain with the help of block diagram. Give some examples of the GAN types utilized for Audio generation and translation.
Draw and explain the block diagram of canonical AI architecture.
Explain the process of knowledge discovery in databases with the help of a diagram.
Draw a comparison chart for AI, ML, and DL based on its meaning, characteristics, types, and futuristic issues.
What is GAN? Draw and explain the architecture of GAN.
What are the different AI-based classification methods in smart grids? Explain in detail.
How do smart traffic management and smart parking contribute to building a smart city? Explain in detail. What are the other components involved in building a smart city?
